title: PROTERRA
content:
Runrig - Proterra
 
 
Capo: 5th Fret
 
 
 
INTRO: C  G  Am  F  (2x)
 
     C                G
As I walk along these shores
         Am          G
I am the history within
     C                 G
As I climb the mountainside
         Am    F
Breaking Eden again
 
 
INTERLUDE:  C    G  Em  F  C  G
 
 
         C             G
Dark the day, dark the night
            Am                 F      G
The warring dust, the mourning tribe
C                    G
Crushed by a million suns
         Am           F
Here the heart of you lies
 
 
INTERLUDE:  C    G  Em  F  C
 
 
CHORUS 1:
     Am
Over land and sea
          C            G
I'll come fighting for you
     C        F
Over land and sea
  Dm      C          G
A dawn is breaking before us
 
 
CHORUS 2:
   C                G
Proterra, take this hand
         Am                  F
The open wound, the promised land
             C                 G
Breaking the waves, spread the oars
         Am            F
Cast our badge for the shore
 
 
INTERLUDE:  C    G  Em  F  C  G  (2x)
 
 
CHORUS 1:

Over land and sea
